## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message and traceback if available.

## Environment

- HipAAsynth version:
- Python version (e.g. 3.11, 3.12):

- Installation method (`pip install -e .`, etc.):

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

**Note:** Do not include any real patient data or PHI. HipAAsynth works only
with synthetic data.
